hubspotAccessToken.description: Legacy app access token used to authenticate with the HubSpot CRM API.

googleClientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for authenticating with the Google Sheets API.

googleClientSecret.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret for authenticating with the Google Sheets API.

googleRefreshToken.description: OAuth 2.0 refresh token used to obtain new access tokens for the Google Sheets API.

googleRefreshUrl.description: The token endpoint URL used to refresh Google OAuth 2.0 access tokens.

spreadsheetId.description: The unique identifier of the Google Spreadsheet where HubSpot contacts will be synced.

subscriberSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Subscriber'.

leadSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Lead'.

marketingqualifiedleadSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Marketing Qualified Lead'.

salesqualifiedleadSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Sales Qualified Lead'.

opportunitySheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Opportunity'.

customerSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Customer'.

evangelistSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Evangelist'.

otherSheetName.description: Name of the worksheet for contacts with lifecycle stage 'Other'.

defaultSheetName.description: Name of the fallback worksheet for contacts whose lifecycle stage does not match any known value.

fields.description: List of HubSpot contact property names to include as columns in the Google Sheet (e.g. ['email', 'firstname', 'lastname', 'phone']).

lastSyncTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp used as the starting checkpoint for incremental sync. Leave empty to perform a full sync on the first run.

contactFilterProperty.description: HubSpot contact property name to filter synced contacts by (e.g. 'hs_lead_status'). Leave empty to sync all contacts.

contactFilterValue.description: Expected value of the filter property. Only contacts matching this value will be synced.

maxRows.description: Maximum number of contacts to process per incremental sync run. Set to 0 for no limit.

syncMode.description: Sync strategy: 'upsert' (default) updates existing rows and inserts new ones; 'append' always inserts; 'replace' clears the sheet then inserts all contacts.
